research_question: After v22 direct substitution, the amount-shock composability screen, and the constrained v23 gated-overlay test all failed to produce a promotable improvement over the frozen v18 working reference, which new atomic price-volume signals from the orthogonal themes of signed amount flow, turnover dynamics, price-volume synchronicity, path efficiency, range compression, failed-breakout pressure, and intraday recovery structure can expand the retained keeper pool before any later family construction is reopened?

discovery_contract.builder_rule: each candidate builder may rank exactly one raw signal field and may not combine multiple raw signals inside the same candidate

signal_pool.interpretation: signals whose recent traded amount is more concentrated on positive-return days may capture a cleaner flow-imbalance edge than existing momentum and liquidity-trend keepers

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced a signed-flow imbalance mechanism that was not a simple restatement of amount shocks or price-volume correlation.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals experiencing a recent turnover acceleration versus their own 20-day baseline may reveal a more actionable trading-activity shock than amount-level surges alone

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced a trading-activity acceleration mechanism distinct from amount-based shocks and liquidity trends.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals with stronger positive synchronicity between price change and amount change may encode cleaner price-volume confirmation than direct breakout overlays

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced a standardized correlation-style price-volume confirmation mechanism distinct from direct breakout overlays.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals that travel more efficiently over a 60-day path may provide a slower and more stable trend-quality edge than short-horizon efficiency or consistency variants

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This tests whether the path-efficiency mechanism becomes cleaner when extended to a slower horizon.
dedup_note.override_reason: Registered as a slower-horizon variant of the canonical path-efficiency mechanism.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals with lower recent trading-range pressure relative to a 40-day baseline may capture a pre-expansion structural state that is distinct from raw volatility level

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This tests whether the same compression-state mechanism works better on a slower ratio of windows.
dedup_note.override_reason: Registered as a slower-horizon variant of the canonical range-compression mechanism.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals with less recent failed-breakout pressure may offer a cleaner structural filter after the direct breakout-confirmation family substitution failed

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced a failure-state structural filter rather than another direct breakout confirmation overlay.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals that recover more effectively from recent downside gaps may encode a more useful resilience edge than standard short-horizon reversal variants

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced a downside-shock recovery mechanism rather than another reversal or trend continuation alias.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals whose amount expansion persists on up days may provide a discrete volume-confirmation edge that is cleaner than direct amount-shock promotion

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced a discrete up-day amount persistence mechanism distinct from raw amount shock magnitude.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals with more stable recent turnover may reveal a cleaner participation-quality dimension than turnover surges or raw liquidity levels

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced a stability-style participation-quality mechanism distinct from turnover acceleration and liquidity level.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals that show stronger intraday recovery especially on weaker days may encode a structural resilience signal distinct from close-location or simple path metrics

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced an intraday resilience skew mechanism distinct from close-location and downside-gap recovery signals.

discovery_contract.aggregation_rule: none; this round explicitly forbids combining signals
discovery_contract.missing_data_rule: score nulls are allowed and must be preserved for audit; no imputation or cross-signal fallback is allowed

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, same TopK=10 width, and same v18 top-15 refresh hysteresis
constants_frozen.portfolio_contract: same v18 refreshed-portfolio implementation until any later family round explicitly changes it

promotion_rule.phase_gate: Only atomic signals that show directionally coherent positive edge in signal-edge diagnostics may advance into a later family-construction or composability-screening round.
promotion_rule.non_promotion_rule: A signal that shows negative or near-zero broad ordering, inverted decile structure, or clearly weaker head labels than both rank11_20 and tail labels should be rejected rather than rescued by later extraction or overlay tweaks.

disallowed_changes: Do not mix multiple raw signals into one candidate inside this round.
Do not change the calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard threshold or guard stage.
Do not change the frozen v18 refresh hysteresis rule.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not add extraction, weight-penalty, turnover-suppression, stability-cap, overlay, or family-composition changes inside this round.
Do not introduce PIT quality, value, or investment fields into this round.
Do not recycle the already screened amount_shock_5_20_raw or breakout_volume_confirmation_20d_raw as direct family modifications in this batch.
notes: This round opens only after the v22 direct substitution test failed, the amount_shock_5_20_raw composability screen returned a mixed verdict, and the constrained v23 gated-overlay test still failed to beat the frozen v18 working reference.

The method therefore explicitly pauses further price-volume family micro-tuning and returns to atomic single-signal discovery with more orthogonal flow, turnover, synchronicity, compression, and recovery hypotheses.
The objective is to find one or more genuinely new clean keepers before any later family-construction or overlay round is reopened.
